overall.description: A smooth aerial drone movement along a sunny beach in a video game environment (GTA V), showcasing weathered wooden stilt houses built on sandy and rocky shoreline. The camera travels laterally from right to left, passing a beach campfire and revealing a continuous row of coastal homes with mountains and palm trees in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with scattered boulders and stilt houses

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting along the sandy shoreline approaching a large wooden stilt house on the left

entered.detail: large two-story weathered wooden house elevated on tall stilts with front balcony
large scattered gray boulders across the sandy beach
green forested hillside rising behind the coastal properties
tall palm trees lining the distant beachfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with a large wooden stilt house dominating the center view. The camera drifts smoothly along the sandy shore scattered with boulders, with green mountains visible in the background and palm trees lining the distant coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach transition zone with campfire and distant pier

events.description: beach campfire with rising smoke becomes visible on the sand ahead
ground surface transitions from smooth sand to rocky gravel terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach past a campfire and approaching the rocky shoreline section

entered.detail: small campfire with dark smoke rising, surrounded by colorful beach items
long wooden pier structure extending into the ocean horizon
continuous line of beach houses on stilts extending along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a smoking beach campfire in the center of the frame while a long wooden pier becomes visible in the distant right. The terrain gradually shifts from smooth sand to rocky gravel as the camera approaches the dense row of stilt houses lining the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline at base of colorful stilt houses

events.description: entering rocky terrain with large boulders between closely packed beach houses

agents.ego_description: navigating through large rocks at the base of colorful stilt houses with utility wires overhead

entered.detail: light green two-story house on wooden pilings with white trim
weathered white and pink house with multiple balconies on stilts
overhead power lines and poles running between the houses

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a rocky shoreline area with large boulders scattered between closely packed stilt houses. A green house and white-pink house dominate the view as overhead utility wires become visible against the blue sky, while the beach campfire and distant pier disappear from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous lateral camera movement along a sunny beach that transitions from an open shoreline into a dense cluster of coastal stilt houses. It begins by drifting past a large wooden stilt house on a sandy shore scattered with boulders, with green mountains and distant palm trees framing the horizon. As the camera glides forward, it passes a smoking beach campfire while a long wooden pier emerges in the distance and the terrain gradually shifts from smooth sand to rocky gravel. The scene then closes in on a row of closely packed dwellings, moving through a rocky shoreline where a green house and a white-pink house dominate the view. Finally, the camera passes under overhead utility wires against a clear blue sky as the campfire and pier disappear behind the structures.
